# Double Choco (Hex) (Extra Cell)

This is two [Double Choco](https://puzz.link/rules.html?dbchoco) on a hex grid that additionally requires one cell be removed to be solvable.

[![Click to solve on Penpa+](../../images/puzzles/2025/doubleChoco1.png)](https://swaroopg92.github.io/penpa-edit/#m=solve&&)
